---
title: "Python Notes"
author: "Ray Erickson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
    css: style.css
    split_by: none
    split_bib: false
    config:
      documentclass: report
      link-citations: yes
      toc_depth: 3
      number_section: false
      number_chapter: false
      toc:
        collapse: section
      code_folding: hide # have check and see if get anoyed when noting code chunks
      toolbar:
        position: fixed
      info: false
      sharing: null
      download: [["book.pdf", "Download PDF"]]
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: none

---

<!--![title](pngs/name.png)-->

# *Python Notes* {.tabset}

## ***General Notes*** {.tabset}
